The '''Morobe system''', also known as the '''Talasea system''', was a system in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]' [[Morobe sector/Legends|Morobe sector]]. It was a binary system with a [[Morobe|red-yellow star]]. [[Talasea]] was the fourth planet of the yellow star. There was at least one other habitable world in the system.

[[Darek system/Legends|Darek system]] was between it and [[Hensara system/Legends|Hensara system]].
